title: T-026 — UI: FIN-010 Variance Drill-down (fin_variance_drilldown, §8.4)
prompt:
# T-026 — FIN-010 Variance Drill-down UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.4 FIN-010 [UNIVERSAL]; §11.5 V-FIN-VAR-01..04 highlights.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:454-621` (`fin_variance_drilldown`)

## Goal
Client Component page `/finance/variance/drilldown` with 5-level hierarchical drill (Category → Item → WO → Transaction → Raw record) + sticky side panel + breadcrumb trail + deep-linkable URL params.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:454-621`.
shadcn primitives: Card, Table, TableRow, TableCell, Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbItem, Button, Badge, Separator.
Depends_on_prototypes: `variance_note_modal` (T-025 created).
Parity checklist:
1. Level state driven by URL params (`?level=0..4&cat=&item=&wo=`) via nuqs.
2. Breadcrumb trail clickable per step (resets to that level + URL update).
3. Level 0: 4 tile Cards (Material / Labor / Overhead / Waste) showing total variance per category for the active period. Click → level=1.
4. Level 1: Item list ranked by absolute variance with RankBar component (% of category total) and VarBadge. Click → level=2.
5. Level 2: WO list contributing to selected item. Click → level=3.
6. Level 3: Embedded condensed WO cost summary (first card + variance breakdown reused from T-020) + transaction list (material_consumption_costs rows for the item+WO). 'View Full WO Cost Card' Link → T-020 page.
7. Level 4: Raw transaction record SummaryList: TX ID, timestamp, LP consumed Link (→ 05-WH), qty_kg, unit_cost, cost method, source.
8. Sticky right sidebar (240px, top-24): aktywne filters (period, category, item) + running tally drill-path variance contribution. Quick actions: 'Add Note' → MODAL-07 (T-025), 'Export' → MODAL-10 (T-032).

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/variance/drilldown/page.tsx` — RSC reads URL params + fetches data for the current level only (other levels are pre-cached via React.cache if cheap, else lazy via SWR).
2. `app/finance/variance/drilldown/_components/drilldown-client.tsx` — Client component for level state + breadcrumb interactions.
3. `app/finance/_components/rank-bar.tsx` — shared primitive (horizontal bar with fav/unfav color).
4. RBAC: visible to `fin.wo_cost.view` permission (own line for prod_manager via RLS).

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/variance/drilldown/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/variance/drilldown/_components/drilldown-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/rank-bar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/variance/drilldown/_components/__tests__/drilldown-client.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given URL ?level=0, when page renders, then 4 category tiles with totals; clicking 'Material' updates URL to ?level=1&cat=Material and shows ranked items. AND given URL ?level=1&cat=Material, when item RM-X clicked, then URL=?level=2&cat=Material&item=RM-X and WO list shown.
- Given level=3 with WO selected, when rendered, then condensed WO summary + tx list; 'View Full WO Cost Card' routes to /finance/wos/[woId]/cost. AND given level=4 with WO and tx selected, when rendered, then raw tx + LP link to 05-WH.
- Given Breadcrumb shows 4 steps and user clicks step 1, when handled, then URL resets to ?level=1&cat=Material (item/wo cleared).
- Given sidebar 'Add Note' clicked, when modal opens, then MODAL-07 with drill-down's WO context. AND given page compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/variance-screens.jsx:454-621 (parity), then 5 levels + breadcrumb + sidebar render correctly.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: drilldown-client.test.tsx asserts URL-driven level state + breadcrumb interactions + level transitions + sidebar Add Note + RTL snapshot of each level.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/variance/drilldown`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not store level state in useState only — must be URL-driven (deep-linkable per UX).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not over-fetch — fetch only the data for the current level (paginate higher levels).
- Do not break the back button (URL state preserves history).
- Do not regress accessibility (Breadcrumb requires aria-current='page' on the active step).
